content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak — Nifty -0.89%, Bank Nifty -0.87%, Realty -2.5%, PSU Bank -2%, VIX +8% to 18.22. But pockets of strength: Pharma +0.56%, IT +0.24%, FMCG showing relative strength on result-day winners (TATACONSUM, MARICO). Book is well-positioned with defensive tilt (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare). Priority is trailing SLs on winners post-Q4-results moves rather than adding fresh risk into a weak-tape afternoon.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.1%, CMP 123.68 vs SL 121.00 (-2.2% from CMP). SL gap healthy. VIX spiking should support gold; hold the hedge. No MODIFY — micro-move not warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 835.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.4%, CMP 847.80 broke through prior 52w high 843. Q4 beat, BULLISH research (+0.07 mod). Tighten SL from 832 → 835 (still 1.5% below CMP, above breakeven). Keep target 870. Trail rule (b): +4% gain warrants SL above entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.9%, CMP 1384.10. Stored SL 1358.97; new_stop_loss 1360 is only +1 — that's <0.5% micro-adjust. Reverting to HOLD instead. ACTUALLY — withdraw MODIFY, see position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.3%, CMP 2794.80. Q4 BULLISH (+0.08 mod), refrigerant capex announced, big +8% move on May 6. SL 2740 = 2% below CMP, appropriate. Not enough gain for trail yet (<+2%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.4%, CMP 9065 just below entry 9100. NEUTRAL research (+0.03), Q4 margin compression flagged, UltraTech competitive overhang. SL 8950 = 1.3% below CMP, intact. No new info; respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5%, CMP 10600. Q4 print done (PAT +103%), buyback at 12000 record date May 29 acts as price floor. SL 10440 = 1.5% below CMP. Buyback floor is the catalyst; respect SL, don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.6%, CMP 479.45. BULLISH research (+0.10), Q4 beat May 7, FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit. SL 468 = 2.4% below CMP, intact. Thesis strengthening, give it room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.7%, CMP 1271, stored SL 1255 already = entry+2.4% (above entry 1226). SL is already trailed — this is a no-op MODIFY, withdrawing. See position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +0.4%, CMP 1253.40. Q4 beat (PAT +21.6%), BULLISH (+0.05 mod), broke out above 52w high 1220 today on +9% move. SL 1198 = 4.4% below CMP — wide but justified by ATR post-breakout. Not enough gain for trail. Note: separate pending BUY 20@1240 LIMIT also exists in OPEN orders — cancel that since the stock is now well above limit and chasing."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER 0%, CMP 865.10 = entry. BULLISH (+0.12 mod), Q4 PAT +34%, order book +61% YoY, all-time-high stock. SL 850 = 1.7% below, appropriate. Hold for breakout follow-through."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.2%, CMP 8081. Q4 results May 20 — BINARY EVENT 7 sessions out, but currently >3 sessions so Rule 11 default disposition not yet triggered. Monitor; reassess on May 14-15 tick. SL 7950 = 1.6% below CMP, intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA -0.1%, CMP 1874. BULLISH (+0.07 mod), at 52w high, Organon deal. Q4 results May 21 — 8 sessions away, outside binary-event window. SL 1830 = 2.3% below CMP, intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.1%, CMP 1652.50. Research turned BEARISH (-0.08 mod): Q4 PAT -15% YoY, peer underperformance vs Metropolis/Thyrocare. SL 1610 = 2.6% below CMP. Thesis weakening but SL intact — respect SL per Rule 17, don't pre-empt. Bias to exit on any bounce."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge role intact; VIX spiking supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 835.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 832 to 835 — above entry 820, locks in +1.8% minimum on a +3.4% winner that just broke 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1358.97 already trailed well above entry 1259 (+7.9%), locking ~7.9% minimum on +9.9% winner. Gap to CMP 1384 is 1.8% — within trail-gap discipline. Target 1500 intact; brokerage TPs 1690-2020 support continuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L only +0.3%, not at trail threshold. SL 2740 = 1.6% below CMP, appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss, NEUTRAL research with competition overhang, but SL 8950 intact and within range. No new post-entry info — let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 / record May 29 = near-term anchor. SL 10440 reasonable. Don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "BULLISH post-Q4, FY27 guidance raised. SL 468 intact. Hold for thesis follow-through."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 already above entry 1226 (+2.4% locked). CMP 1271, gap to SL is 1.3% — within trail-gap discipline. Don't tighten further; let the breakout extend toward target 1320."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+9% breakout day post-Q4 beat, BULLISH. Position only +0.4% (entered at high). Cancel the separate pending TATACONSUM LIMIT 1240 BUY in OPEN orders — stale, stock now at 1257 and chasing makes no sense."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry; BULLISH +0.12 mod. Allow breakout to develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 20 — currently 7 sessions out, just outside binary window. Reassess on May 14 tick when within 3 sessions per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 — 8 sessions out. Pharma at 52w high, Organon catalyst, BULLISH. Reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Research flipped BEARISH post-results (Q4 PAT -15%). SL 1610 intact (2.6% gap). Per Rule 17, don't front-run SL; bias to exit on any bounce to entry."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed non-held watchlist names for new admits given deployment at 52% (below 80% soft target) and India VIX +8% in a weak tape:\n- INFY/HCLTECH: IT sector +0.24% but COFORGE already provides IT exposure with a +10% open winner. Skip cluster duplication (Rule 10).\n- TORNTPHARM: Pharma +3.95% gainer, but SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS + LALPATHLAB already give 3-name healthcare/pharma exposure. Cluster-cap concern.\n- MCX: +5% on Q4 PAT +291% — interesting but not in current research depth; pass.\n- AFFLE: +12.25% gainer — extended chase, no fundamental research; skip.\n- THERMAX: +9% gap-up but capital-goods cluster already has CGPOWER + POLYCAB; Rule 10 limit. Skip.\n- BIOCON: Pharma cluster-full, skip.\n- APTUS: BULLISH (+0.12), already +4% intraday on 6.6x volume; chase risk after move. Better entry on pullback to 270-275.\n- ASIANPAINT: Research turned NEUTRAL (-0.05) with Birla Opus competitive overhang; pass.\n- NIFTYBEES: Tactical bounce idea but VIX +8% and Nifty breaking 24K argues against catching the knife.\nRationale for not admitting: 13 existing positions cover FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, IT, Chemicals, Cap Goods, Auto, Gold defensively. Adding into a -0.9% Nifty day with VIX +8% would compound risk on a -2.45% session. Waiting for either (a) VIX to roll lower with index reclaim of 24000, or (b) clear pullback entries in BULLISH-rated names (APTUS, MARICO add, COFORGE add) before redeploying further. This is rule-18-compliant: each candidate has a specific reject reason.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day P&L -2.45% (-₹23,840) with realized -₹28,429 already booked; daily loss limit remaining ₹49,237 — substantial buffer. Deployment 52% with ₹462K cash. CRITICAL HYGIENE: 2 stale OPEN orders need attention — TATACONSUM BUY 20@1240 LIMIT (placed 390min ago, stock now 1257, unfillable and chasing-irrelevant) and HFCL BUY 600@133.50 MIS LIMIT (placed 7735min ago = 5+ days, MIS order in OPEN state for 5 days is clearly a stale leftover that should have been auto-cancelled — flag for engine review). Cannot CANCEL via this schema explicitly; noting for risk monitor. Trail discipline applied to MARICO. Two upcoming binary events on the book: APOLLOHOSP Q4 May 20 (7 sessions), SUNPHARMA Q4 May 21 (8 sessions) — both outside the 3-session window but will need explicit disposition decisions by May 14-15. Win-rate 12% over 5 days with profit factor 0.3x is a red flag — over-trading the exit side (Rule 17 lesson from Day-12 still relevant). Plan: let SLs do their job, trail winners monotonically, don't add into weak tape, reassess admits when VIX cools."
}
